# 🌌 **Project Mosberg**

### _A modular ecosystem of plugins & generators for Perchance.org_

Project Mosberg is a growing suite of tools designed for creators, tinkerers, and worldbuilders who want more power, consistency, and style inside the Perchance platform.

Whether you're building text‑to‑image workflows, character generators, or custom style packs, Mosberg gives you the building blocks.

---

## ⭐ **Why Project Mosberg Exists**

- To make Perchance creation **faster**, **cleaner**, and **more modular**
- To provide **reusable frameworks** instead of one‑off scripts
- To give creators **consistent styles** for text‑to‑image prompts
- To offer **ready‑to‑use generators** for characters, Pokémon, and more
- To support **extensibility**, so contributors can build on top of the ecosystem

---

# 🚀 **Core Plugins**

## **T2I Framework Plugin**

A flexible foundation for building advanced text‑to‑image generators.

**Live:** https://perchance.org/t2i-framework-plugin-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/t2i-framework-plugin-moss#edit

---

## **T2I Styles**

A curated library of reusable text‑to‑image style presets.

**Live:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss#edit

---

## **T2I Styles Anime**

Anime‑focused presets for consistent character and scene generation.

**Live:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss-anime
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss-anime#edit

---

## **T2I Styles NSFW**

A separate, opt‑in style pack for NSFW workflows.

**Live:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss-nsfw
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss-nsfw#edit

# 🧬 **Generators**

## **AI Character Generator**

Creates characters with appearance, personality, and lore modules.

**Live:** https://perchance.org/ai-character-generator-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/ai-character-generator-moss#edit

---

## **AI Pokémon Generator**

Generates new Pokémon species with typings, abilities, and flavor text.

**Live:** https://perchance.org/ai-pokemon-generator-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/ai-pokemon-generator-moss#edit

---

## **AI Text‑to‑Image Generator**

A general‑purpose T2I generator powered by the Mosberg framework.

**Live:** https://perchance.org/ai-text-to-image-generator-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/ai-text-to-image-generator-moss#edit

---

# 🧱 **Ecosystem Philosophy**

### **Modular**

Every plugin and generator is designed as a building block.

### **Extensible**

Creators can fork, remix, and expand the tools.

### **Consistent**

Shared styles, shared frameworks, shared logic.

### **Open**

Everything is public, editable, and remix‑friendly.

---

# 📦 **Installation & Usage**

You don’t “install” Project Mosberg — you **use** it by linking to the generators or copying the plugin code into your own Perchance projects.

Each plugin page includes:

- Editable source
- Documentation
- Examples
- Style presets
- Integration notes

---

# 🛠️ **Contributing**

Project Mosberg is designed to be contributor‑friendly:

- Clear structure
- Modular code
- Consistent naming
- Easy to fork
- Easy to extend

If you want to add a style pack, generator, or plugin, reach out or fork any of the existing tools.
